name: Hepatitis A Vaccine Codes (All Formulations)
description: CVX and CPT codes for hepatitis A vaccines including pediatric, adult, and combination formulations. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) and immunizations for adolescents (IMA) measures. Requires 2 doses with first dose at 12-23 months.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
